articles.title: Rolls Royce Plan for Moon Nuclear Reactor Stalls, Telegraph Says
articles.description: British engine maker Rolls-Royce Holdings Plc has halted a plan backed backed by millions in government funding to put a mini nuclear reactor on the Moon, the Telegraph reported.
articles.content:
(Bloomberg) -- British engine maker Rolls-Royce Holdings Plc has halted a plan backed backed by millions in government funding to put a mini nuclear reactor on the Moon, the Telegraph reported.

articles.title: Budget numbers show Government is abandoning its kartavya and that's not good news
articles.description: The union government wants to play a less important role in the Indian economy if we are to go by the budget. And that is not good news in these troubled times.
articles.content:
Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman's ninth budget on the trot was expected to do a lot of the heavy lifting what with the world roiled by troubles headlined with a capital T. So, how did it fare?

articles.title: Jude Bellingham in tears after Real Madrid injury, 'an important loss'
articles.description: Jude Bellingham was substituted early in Real Madrid's LaLiga game with Rayo Vallecano on Sunday, forced off with what appeared to be a hamstring injury.
